title: knautia arvensis var. subscaposa
intro: Knautia arvensis var. subscaposa, also known as the field scabious or devil's bit, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis var. subscaposa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and allergies, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
